top_risk_areas.risk_reason: Massive parallel page tree under src/app/pages/ duplicates src/pages/ with inconsistent quality. Contains 8 window.confirm calls, mixed English strings, inconsistent error/loading states. Highest blast-radius for a batch audit.
Contains hardcoded English ('Warehouse A', 'Office HQ', 'All Categories'), and MOCK_PREVIEW constant used as fallback data source. Both i18n and mock removal needed.
Newest work-order pages still use window.confirm for destructive actions. Need migration to dialog pattern + i18n sweep.

top_risk_areas.area: Disposal form pages (4 pages) — Complex form interaction
top_risk_areas.risk_reason: Multi-step forms with asset selectors, department trees, location trees. High interaction surface — every button, validation, loading state, error state needs verification.
Still uses mockSteps array (line 175) for approval timeline rendering. Needs real API binding.
Node-edge graph editor with drag, connect, delete, save interactions. High UI complexity — each interaction needs loading/error/empty state coverage.
WebGL canvas with real-time data binding. formatNumber has undefined handling but 700+ lines of complex rendering. Loading/error fallback for 3D scene is critical.
First page users see. 6 parallel API calls with individual loading/error states. trend prop explicitly passed undefined (line 248). Every chart/card needs 100-point verification.
Complex CRUD with detail panel, maintenance records, form validation. computeMaintenanceStatus handles undefined but edge cases in form submission need audit.

~20 root-level page files with mixed patterns (some class components, some hooks). AssetRegistry uses window.confirm. Multiple dashboard variants suggest dead code. Highest uncertainty for per-page audit.

audit_checklist_per_page: i18n: zero English strings in UI-facing text
undefined: all displayed values have fallback (?? or || '')
mock: no hardcoded/mock data as fallback
loading: skeleton/spinner on every async data load
error: user-friendly error state with retry on every API call
empty: empty-state UI when data returns []
a11y: basic keyboard nav + aria labels on interactive elements
dead-code: no unused imports, variables, or unreachable code
rationale: Heavy classification due to sheer scope (~85 page files across two parallel directory trees) combined with 6 distinct quality dimensions (i18n, undefined fallback, mock removal, loading/error/empty states). This is not a single refactoring — it's a systematic per-page audit requiring builder changes + reviewer verification. Debate is not needed because the acceptance criteria are well-defined (100-point per page) and the approach is straightforward batch-fix. The 8 remaining window.confirm calls in src/app/ and the mock data in AssetImportExport/RetirementDetail are known-specific fixes. The highest risk is the src/app/ legacy layer which has inconsistent patterns and duplicates src/pages/ functionality.
